description: At Name of Your Clinic, we are your ultimate destination for all your dental needs. Our team is dedicated to providing exceptional dental solutions with precision and care. Schedule an appointment today to embark on a delightful dental experience like never before.

We go above and beyond to deliver upon our promise of quality and care. Excellent service .
The hygienic environment and patience is commendable. I can't think of a better oral care provider for me. Special thanks to Dr Barkha for being so calm and patient.
Really grateful and highly recommended. Akash Sapra Patient The treatment of my tooth was satisfactory.
Root canal and capping done which were done properly and no pain.
Cleaning also done which was very good.
The staff and the doctor both were really helpful and proper.
Thank you so much. PREETI MINNY Patient Absolutely outstanding! Had come for a teeth cleanup. Extremely professional and helpful. And the session was outstanding and without even a speck of pain. Nikhilesh Koundinya Patient I recently had a root canal and bridge treatment done by Dr. Barkha Tharani, and I must say, the experience was nothing short of outstanding. The care and precision with which she handled the entire procedure were impressive. Dr. Tharani’s clinic is equipped with the most modern and updated instruments, which made me feel confident that I was in the best hands.

What truly sets Dr. Tharani apart is her attention to detail and patient care. Throughout the process, she ensured that I was comfortable and well-informed. The final result, both aesthetically and functionally, is superb! The bridge fits perfectly, and the overall outcome exceeded my expectations.

For anyone looking for high-quality dental care, I wholeheartedly recommend Dr. Barkha Tharani. Her expertise, combined with a state-of-the-art clinic, makes her the best choice for dental treatments. Raj Chaudhari Patient I can confidently say that this is one of the best dental clinics I have ever visited, having lived in various parts of the world. The staff is exceptionally polite. Dr. Barkha Jain stands out as an extraordinary dentist. Her extensive knowledge and thorough approach to treatment are truly impressive; she considers every angle when addressing dental issues.

Dr. Jain is incredibly patient and takes the time to explain everything clearly and concisely. I came to her with significant problems regarding my teeth and thanks to her hard work, the transformation in my mouth and jaw is remarkable. I wholeheartedly and highly recommend her to anyone seeking dental care! Smita Bellani Patient Core-The Tooth Centre sets the standard for professionalism in dental care. Dr. Barkha and her team are exceptionally skilled and courteous. The level of organization and cleanliness in the clinic is outstanding. Dr. Barkha's professional demeanor and thorough explanations made me feel at ease during my entire treatment. This is by far the best dental experience I've had, and I appreciate the high level of professionalism shown by everyone at the clinic. varthik thakkar Patient Be assured that you would be consulting one of the top dentists in Cuffe parade, Mumbai at Core-The Tooth Centre.
